title: R@chab`am #7346
definition:
Rehoboam = "a people has enlarged"

 1) son of Solomon and the 1st king of Judah after the split up of
    the kingdom of Israel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Rehoboam = "a people has enlarged"

 1) son of Solomon and the 1st king of Judah after the split up of
    the kingdom of Israel

    NASB:  a people are enlarged, a king of Judah
